senators.name: Deb Fischer
senators.notNerdReason: B.S. from University of Nebraska-Lincoln. Career as cattle rancher and state senator. Agricultural and political background. No analytical or evidence-based policy approach.

senators.name: Pete Ricketts
senators.notNerdReason: B.A. and M.B.A. from University of Chicago. Dual degrees from an elite institution known for rigorous analytical training. Career as executive at TD Ameritrade. Governor of Nebraska. Strong business analytical foundation but governance approach more executive-managerial than evidence-based.

NE-01.name: Mike Flood
NE-01.notNerdReason: B.A. and J.D. from University of Notre Dame. Career as media company owner and state legislator (Speaker of the Nebraska Legislature). Notre Dame law degree and legislative speakership show intellectual capability but approach is more business-oriented than analytically rigorous.

NE-02.name: Don Bacon
NE-02.nerdReason: B.A. in political science from Northern Illinois University, M.A. from National War College, and M.A. from University of Virginia. Air Force Brigadier General (retired) with 29 years of service. Multiple graduate degrees combined with general officer-level military leadership require exceptional strategic and analytical capabilities.
education: B.A. Political Science, Northern Illinois University
experience: U.S. Air Force, Brigadier General (ret.), 29 years
Commander, 55th Wing, Offutt Air Force Base

NE-03.name: Adrian Smith
NE-03.notNerdReason: B.S. from University of Nebraska. Career as business owner and state legislator. Dean of Nebraska's delegation. No analytical or evidence-based policy background.
